title: Property Consultant - Brookfield India REIT - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Brookfield India REIT - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Brookfield India REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Brookfield India REIT:
Brookfield India REIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brookfield India REIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
